name: Three Cheese Garlic Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Finely minced garlic or -dash garlic powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bread slices on an ungreased cookie sheet.
2. In a small bowl, combine the Parmesan cheese and garlic; sprinkle evenly over bread.
3. Sprinkle with shredded mozzarella and reduced-fat cheddar cheeses.
4. Broil 4 to 6 inches from heat for 2 to 4 minutes or until the cheese is melted and lightly browned.
5. Serve immediately.
